rows.headline: CrowdStrike To Rally Around 7%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
rows.summary: Wall Street analysts changed outlook on top names. Goldman Sachs raised PSX target, BTIG cut DRVN target, Morgan Stanley cut NWL target, B of A raised TK target, Stifel raised PANW target, Mizuho cut HD target, Goldman Sachs raised ENPH target, B of A raised NTAP target.

rows.headline: Chip Stocks Just Hit A Record Overbought Level: History Shows The Aftermath Is Rough
rows.summary: BofA technical strategist Paul Ciana flagged an all-time-high weekly RSI on the VanEck Semiconductor ETF this week. Seven prior signals since 1995 averaged a 44% drawdown that took roughly 73 weeks to bottom.

rows.headline: Elon Musk Says Tesla Robotaxis Could Go Widespread This Year, But Prediction Markets Say 'Nah'
rows.summary: Musk promises Tesla robotaxis will spread nationwide this year. Polymarket traders, Tesla's own Q1 letter, and a Waymo recall tell a different story.
